examples: Your children should be literate and numerate.
All students should be numerate and literate when they leave school.
Some children still leave school both illiterate and in numerate.
Even now, South Africa's schoolchildren remain among the least numerate in the world, although literacy rates are improving.
Botswana's school-leavers are, on average, more literate and numerate than South Africa's, so workers are not hard to train.
